product: Select tables and create pivot tables in Google Sheets
tagline: You can now directly select Databricks tables from the Catalog Explorer and import data as pivot tables in Google Sheets using the Databricks Connector.
what_it_does: You can now directly select Databricks tables from the Catalog Explorer and import data as pivot tables in Google Sheets using the Databricks Connector. The Databricks Connector for Google Sheets connects your Databricks workspace with Google Sheets. Use the connector to query Databricks data from within Google Sheets, enabling further analysis.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: You can now directly select Databricks tables from the Catalog Explorer and import data as pivot tables in Google Sheets using the Databricks Connector.
